commitMuse.language.description: Language used for the generated commit message.

commitMuse.useEmoji.description: Allow emoji in generated commit messages.

commitMuse.outputMode.description: Output one commit entry or multiple entries.

commitMuse.apiKey.description: API key for your OpenAI-compatible provider.

commitMuse.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint.

commitMuse.model.description: Model name to use when generating commit messages.

commitMuse.promptTemplate.markdownDescription: Prompt template for generation. Available placeholders: `{{language}}`, `{{outputModeInstruction}}`, `{{emojiInstruction}}`, `{{diff}}`.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
